description: A hospital is onboarding a new laboratory department. As the IT security officer, create a new security role in OpenMRS (https://localhost/openmrs/admin) named 'Lab Technician' with the description 'Role for laboratory staff to view patients and manage lab results'. The role must have no inherited roles and include exactly these six privileges: Get Patients, Get Encounters, Get Observations, Add Observations, Edit Observations, and Get Orders. You are logged in as admin (superman / Admin123). The browser is open to the Bahmni home page.
